summary: Results-driven M.Tech graduate in Computer Science (AI/ML) from RGPV University with a strong academic background (B.Tech ECE, 9.23 CGPA, 92%). Experienced in building and deploying end-to-end machine learning solutions using Python, Scikit-learn, FastAPI, Flask, and Docker. Demonstrated ability to deliver production-ready ML APIs across healthcare, finance, and NLP domains. Currently strengthening DSA skills targeting 150+ problems. Seeking ML/software engineering roles in Hyderabad service-based companies.

projects.name: Medical AI Assistant with RAG
highlights: RAG-based assistant using LLMs and semantic search over medical knowledge base
FastAPI backend with source citations and safety monitoring

projects.name: Fraud Detection MLOps System
highlights: End-to-end MLOps pipeline with inference logging and failure debugging
Containerized with Docker and production monitoring dashboards

projects.name: Job Skill Analyzer
highlights: Compares resumes against job descriptions using NLP and sentence embeddings
Generates skill gap analysis and personalized learning roadmap

projects.name: House Price Prediction API
highlights: End-to-end ML API on California housing dataset with full Docker deployment

projects.name: Fake News Detection Web App
highlights: Dockerized Flask app for fake news detection using TF-IDF and Logistic Regression

projects.name: Wine Quality Prediction
highlights: Random Forest model with Flask API deployment

projects.name: Rock vs Mine Prediction
highlights: Sonar signal classification with training, inference, and Docker setup

projects.name: Loan Status Prediction
highlights: SVM-based loan approval predictor deployed via FastAPI

projects.name: Diabetes Prediction
highlights: End-to-end ML API for diabetes prediction using SVM, FastAPI, and Docker

ongoing_development: Solving 150+ DSA problems (Arrays, Strings, Linked Lists, Recursion)
Deepening Python and ML theory with hands-on practicals (Iris dataset, data visualization)
